---
title: "Educational Resources"
listing:
  - id: tutorials
    contents: ressources.yml
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "title"
    fields: [image, title, authors, description, categories]
  - id: dataviz
    contents: dataviz.yml   # or whatever your source file is
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "date"
    fields: [image, title, authors, description, categories]
---

# Tutorials

::: {#tutorials}
:::

# Dataviz

::: {#dataviz}
:::
